# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [NTSA to Launch Digital Vehicle Logbook System in June](https://zandani.co.ke/article/ntsa-to-launch-digital-logbook-system-in-june) - NTSA will transition to a digital logbook system starting June 10 to improve security and streamline vehicle registration via TIMS and e-Citizen.
- [Priscilla Ojo Defends Juma Jux Amid Fertility Rumors](https://zandani.co.ke/article/priscilla-ojo-defends-juma-jux-amid-fertility-rumors) - Priscilla Ojo Defends Juma Jux Amid Fertility Rumors: Priscilla Ojo clarifies that her partner Juma Jux is choosing to delay fatherhood, dismissing public
- [Kenya Partners with China to Build Sponge Cities and Green Projects](https://zandani.co.ke/article/kenya-china-partnership-green-infrastructure-sponge-city-projects) - Kenya Partners with China to Build Sponge Cities and Green Projec: Kenya is adopting Chinese environmental and infrastructure models, including a Sh47 billion
- [Hull City defeat Millwall to edge closer to Championship final](https://zandani.co.ke/article/hull-city-defeat-millwall-championship-play-off-semi-final) - Hull City secured a vital victory against Millwall in the Championship play-off semi-final after second-half goals from Joe Gelhardt and Mo Belloumi.
- [Carrie Underwood Denies Feud Rumors With Guest Judge Nikki Glaser](https://zandani.co.ke/article/carrie-underwood-denies-feud-rumors-with-nikki-glaser) - Carrie Underwood Denies Feud Rumors With Guest Judge Nikki Glaser: Carrie Underwood has dismissed social media rumors of tension with comedian Nikki Glaser
- [Ivory Ledger: The tsc unemployed teachers data update](https://zandani.co.ke/article/ivory-ledger-tsc-unemployed-teachers-data-update) - Ivory Ledger: The tsc unemployed teachers data update: In the shadow of the rubber vines, a census was taken, promising futures while masking a tsc primary
